metodos.codigoOriginal:
Local lnTpRel
lnTpRel = ThisForm.NivImprs.Value

Do Case
	Case LnTpRel = 1
		Report Form SigReIfA to Print Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 2
		Report Form SigReIfB to Print Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 3 Or LnTpRel = 4
		Report Form SigReIfC to Print Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 5
		Report Form SigReIfD to Print Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 6
		Report Form SigReIfE to Print Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 7
		Report Form SigReIfF to Print Noconsole
EndCase
* Fim ******************************************************... [TRUNCADO]

Local lnTpRel
lnTpRel = ThisForm.NivImprs.Value
Do Case
	Case LnTpRel = 1
		Report Form SigReIfA to Print Prompt Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 2
		Report Form SigReIfB to Print Prompt Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 3 Or LnTpRel = 4
		Report Form SigReIfC to Print Prompt Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 5
		Report Form SigReIfD to Print Prompt Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 6
		Report Form SigReIfE to Print Prompt Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 7
		Report Form SigReIfF to Print Prompt Noconsole
EndCase
* Fim *************... [TRUNCADO]

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		lcQuery = [Select * ] + ;
				    [From SigCdGcr ] + ;
				   [Where BalFalPers = 1]

		If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQuery, 'TmpGccr') < 1)
			=MessageBox('Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo (TmpGccr)')
			Return 0
		EndIf
		Select TmpGccr
		Index On Codigos Tag Grupos

		lcQuery = [Select a.* ] + ;
				    [From SigCdCli a, SigCdGcr b ] + ;
				   [Where a.Grupo... [TRUNCADO]

Private pDtI, pDtF, pTru
Local ldDti, ldDtf, lnNiv

ldDtI = ThisForm.get_dt_inicial.Value
ldDtf = ThisForm.get_dt_Final.Value
lnNiv = ThisForm.NivImprs.Value
lcNiv = Str(lnNiv,1)
lcTpM = ThisForm.get_tpmat.Value
lcFor = ThisForm.get_ifor.Value
lcGrp = ThisForm.getCdGrupo.Value

Create Cursor TmpRelat (Operacs c(30), Totas n(12,2), Grupos c(10), Dgrupos c(30), Contas c(10), Rclis c(30), ;
						falhags n(12,2), Recupgs n(12,2), Perdags n(12,2), Falhaps n(7,2), Recupps n(7,2), ;
						Perdaps n(7,... [TRUNCADO]

Local lnTpRel
lnTpRel = ThisForm.NivImprs.Value
Do Case
	Case LnTpRel = 1 
		Report Form SigReIfA Preview Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 2
		Report Form SigReIfB Preview Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 3 or LntpRel = 4
		Report Form SigReIfC Preview Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 5
		Report Form SigReIfD Preview Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 6
		Report Form SigReIfE Preview Noconsole
	Case LnTpRel = 7
		Report Form SigReIfF Preview Noconsole
EndCase
* Fim ************************************************************... [TRUNCADO]

Local loBrowse

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If Not Seek(This.Value, 'TmpGccr','Grupos')
		loBrowse = CreateObject('fwBuscaSel', 'TmpGccr', 'Grupos', This.Value, 'Cadastro de Setores')
		loBrowse.AddColuna('Codigos', '', 'Grupo', .t., 'Grupos')
		loBrowse.AddColuna('Descrs', '', 'Descriçăo')
		loBrowse.Show
	EndIf
	
	ThisForm.getCdGrupo.Value = Iif(LastKey()==27,'',Evaluate('TmpGccr.Codigos'))
	ThisForm.getDsGrupo.Value = Iif(LastKey()==27,'',Evaluate('TmpGccr.Descrs'))
	ThisForm.getCdGrupo.Refresh... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If !fAcessoContas( Usuar, [], 'C', This.Value, This, ThisForm.get_dfor)
		MessageBox( 'Acesso Negado...', 48, '' )
		This.Value = ' '
		ThisForm.get_dFor.Value = ''
		Return(.F.)
	EndIf	
Else
	ThisForm.get_ifor.Value = ''
	ThisForm.get_dfor.Value = ''
EndIf
ThisForm.get_ifor.Refresh
ThisForm.get_dfor.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	lcQuery = [Select Cods, Descs ] + ;
				[From SigOpOpt ] + ;
			   [Where Situas = 3]

	If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQuery, 'TmpOpt') < 1)
		=MessageBox('Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo (TmpOpt)')
		Return 0
	EndIf
	Select TmpOpt
	Index On Cods Tag Cods
	
	If Not Seek(This.Value)
		loBrowse = CreateObject('fwBuscaSel', 'TmpOpt', 'Cods', This.Value, 'Cadastro de Tipos de Operaçăo')
		loBrowse.AddColuna('Cods',  '', 'Código', .t., 'Cods')
... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If !fAcessoContas( Usuar, [], 'D', This.Value, ThisForm.get_Ifor, This)
		MessageBox( 'Acesso Negado...', 48, '' )
		This.Value = ' '
		ThisForm.get_iFor.Value = ''
		Return(.F.)
	EndIf	
Else
	ThisForm.get_ifor.Value = ''
	ThisForm.get_dfor.Value = ''
EndIf
ThisForm.get_ifor.Refresh
ThisForm.get_dfor.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************
